description_long: This is a modern wall-mounted bathroom vanity cabinet made primarily of light-colored wood with a natural grain finish. The left side features a round, white ceramic vessel sink set into the countertop, with a sleek, metallic wall-mounted faucet above it. The right side of the cabinet has two open shelves for storage, while the left side includes a large door that conceals additional storage space. The back view reveals plumbing fixtures and a partially open compartment beneath the sink. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible handles, emphasizing a contemporary aesthetic. The cabinet is suitable for urban bathrooms, providing both functional storage and a stylish appearance.
description: A modern, wall-mounted wooden bathroom vanity with a white vessel sink, open shelves, and a concealed storage compartment. Features a minimalist design with a natural wood finish and metallic faucet.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round white vessel sink, metallic faucet, and the wood grain of the cabinet.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the sink placement, open shelves on the right, and the large door on the left.
description_view_2: Side view focusing on the depth of the cabinet and the protruding vessel sink.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing the plumbing fixtures and the interior compartment beneath the sink.
